description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent central section and extended horizontal wings on either side. The front face displays a red panel with a circular emblem or logo, likely serving as signage or branding. The kiosk is constructed from a solid, metallic-looking material, giving it a modern and durable appearance. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the central section as the main point of interaction. There are no visible windows or doors, suggesting a closed or service-only design. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the main body, providing a clean, minimalist silhouette.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a central red sign and flat, extended wings, made of metallic material and featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red signage panel with a circular emblem, flanked by horizontal extensions.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the kiosk's narrow profile and the depth of the central section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, solid surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the same narrow profile and solid construction.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with circular logo, centrally placed on the front panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhang, constructed from the same metallic material as the body.
